The study of physiological stress in fish caused by elevated water temperatures.
The biochemical process of breaking down food involving enzymes like pepsin and trypsin.
The evaluation of fish development through indicators like weight gain and growth rate.

Herbal extract supplemented at 0.5%/kg in the fish diet.
A mixture of Pg0.2 and Pa0.5 extracts in the fish diet.
